title: The History of Rome in 60 Seconds
script_summary: A swift journey through Rome's legendary rise and tragic fall.

segments.voiceover: From a muddy village to an empire that shaped the world — in one minute.
Founded in 753 BC, Rome began as a humble settlement by the Tiber River, steeped in myth.
Legends say Romulus and Remus, raised by a she-wolf, fought for dominance — one would become king.
Over centuries, Rome expanded, conquering lands from Gaul to Egypt, a beacon of power and culture.
But, with great power came unrest; political chaos and invasions led to its downfall in 476 AD.
Curious about more history? Like and follow for more fascinating stories!
